creator: vsemionov@gmail.com
text:
Sorry, the patch file does not appear in the PR, so I am sending it again:

diff -urN pkg-orphan.orig/Makefile pkg-orphan/Makefile
--- pkg-orphan.orig/Makefile    2011-04-16 18:39:16.000000000 +0300
+++ pkg-orphan/Makefile    2011-04-16 18:27:28.000000000 +0300
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
  # New ports collection makefile for:    pkg-orphan
-# Date created:                26 November 2005
+# Date created:                27 November 2005
  # Whom:                    Victor Semionov <semionov@mail.bg>
  #
  # $FreeBSD: ports/ports-mgmt/pkg-orphan/Makefile,v 1.4 2009/08/22 
00:34:31 amdmi3 Exp $
  #

  PORTNAME=    pkg-orphan
-PORTVERSION=    0.1.1
+PORTVERSION=    1.0.1
  CATEGORIES=    ports-mgmt
  MASTER_SITES=    SF

diff -urN pkg-orphan.orig/distinfo pkg-orphan/distinfo
--- pkg-orphan.orig/distinfo    2011-04-16 18:39:16.000000000 +0300
+++ pkg-orphan/distinfo    2011-04-16 18:26:01.000000000 +0300
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (pkg-orphan-0.1.1.tar.gz) = 4be6c6921db432177870e6b00aec55ee
-SHA256 (pkg-orphan-0.1.1.tar.gz) = 
a2dc15fd04b7672017fbab32e0f46421b67e6ec6f73db9329f82313ee68aeb21
-SIZE (pkg-orphan-0.1.1.tar.gz) = 5948
+MD5 (pkg-orphan-1.0.1.tar.gz) = a2941d0e9aac1e0da36100e0266d7b3c
+SHA256 (pkg-orphan-1.0.1.tar.gz) = 
7a7734156d6a50f4c1c3f2dbb21d2370b3d74eaf1b717bf903d8474c6f049f61
+SIZE (pkg-orphan-1.0.1.tar.gz) = 6137
